basicInfo.name: Creative City Building Blocks Mega Set
basicInfo.nameZh: 创意城市积木超级套装

features: 800+ pieces in diverse shapes and sizes
Reusable storage container with sorting trays

pricing.packaging: Colorful corrugated box with carry handle (12pcs/carton)

sellingPoints: Universal appeal across ages and genders
Exceptional piece count for the price point
Develops STEM skills through open-ended play
Proven timeless toy category with consistent demand

secondary: Emerging markets with growing middle class

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Unleash creativity with the Mega Set! 800+ colorful building blocks compatible with leading brands let imaginations run wild. Build cities, vehicles, creatures, or anything you can dream – the possibilities are endless!
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 用超级套装释放创造力！800多个彩色积木块与领先品牌兼容，让想象力自由驰骋。建造城市、车辆、生物或你能梦想的任何东西——可能性是无限的！

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Build Anything – Creative City Blocks Mega Set
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 建造一切——创意城市积木超级套装
marketingCopy.bodyEn: The Mega Set represents incredible value in the building block category. With 800+ precision-molded pieces in a rainbow of colors, smooth safety-tested edges, and full compatibility with market-leading brands, it's the ultimate creative canvas. The included instruction booklet provides inspiration with 20+ models, but the true magic happens when children follow their own imagination to create unique masterpieces.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 超级套装代表了积木品类中令人难以置信的价值。拥有800多个精确模制的彩虹色部件、经过安全测试的光滑边缘以及与市场领先品牌的完全兼容性，它是终极的创作画布。随附的说明书提供了20多种模型的灵感，但真正的魔法发生在孩子们追随自己的想象力创造独特的杰作时。
